Title: cartPickupLocations — Two Configurable Variants Same ProductId
Preconditions:
- Auth as mutykovaelena@gmail.com or Alice May
- Cart has 2 configurable variants of same base product (same ProductId, different options)
- Pickup delivery method selected
- GraphQL Playground open at https://vcst-qa.govirto.com/ui/graphiql
Steps:
1. Log in and clear cart
2. Add configurable product with Option A to cart
3. Add same product with Option B to cart
4. Verify 2 line items visible in cart
5. Select Pickup delivery method
6. Get cartId from URL or network
7. Open GraphQL Playground
8. Execute cartPickupLocations query with cartId
9. Inspect response for errors vs data
Expected Result:
- Response contains data.cartPickupLocations
- No errors array in response
- No ArgumentException or ARGUMENT error code
- totalCount is non-negative integer
- items array present (may be empty but no error)
- term_facets array present

Title: API Response Confirms No Error Toast Trigger
Preconditions:
- Multi-variant configurable cart (TC-BE-001 state)
- Chrome DevTools Network tab open
Steps:
1. On cart page with multi-variant configurable items
2. Click pencil/edit icon next to pickup address
3. Monitor Network tab for cartPickupLocations GraphQL request
4. Inspect request/response
5. Check browser console for uncaught exceptions
Expected Result:
- HTTP 200 response
- Response JSON has no errors key
- Console has no uncaught exception for pickup locations
- Modal opens (frontend confirmation)

- No duplicate entries per ProductId in response
- Fix uses GroupBy + Sum correctly
